全服公告：大型沉浸式历史策略游戏《大明1662：文明火种》不删档内测，正式开启！

【本游戏特色】：

1. 100%物理拟真：冷热兵器手感真实，伤口感染、饥饿度全模拟，痛觉可调但建议别关。
2. 超宏大沙盒世界：地图涵盖明清鼎革之际的全球，历史事件实时推进。
3. 史诗阵营对抗：加入“南明复国军”，对抗“汉奸吴三桂”与“清帝国”！
4. 自由身份玩法：你可以成为无双猛将、基建狂魔、间谍大师、乃至商业巨贾。

【当前版本主线】：我们的阵营领袖、神秘的核心NPC“朱慈爝”，正被困缅北孤峰。他刚刚发布了第一个史诗任务：
“以这座山为起点，建立一个国度，然后——向我们的杀父仇人，吴三桂，发动一场跨越时空的复仇。”

玩家论坛已炸锅：
“这NPC智能度逆天了！”
“砍树挖矿手感太真实了，就是这缅北蚊子也是100%模拟吗？！”
“别抱怨了！组队下山抢……啊不，是‘收集’吴三桂的军粮去！”
——欢迎来到，最硬核也最疯狂的新世界。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oea318ea4435471e29f4a7a0a4f2488a4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"严肃又无趣的和大人","author_id":"","book_id":"7594034844410055742","book_name":"明末：带着第四天灾重建大明","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":126,"name":"明朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=126&name=明朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594034848818283070","read_count":"15324","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"294608"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"114","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,清朝,第四天灾,系统,穿越,明朝,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oea318ea4435471e29f4a7a0a4f2488a4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779452804&x-signature=xWmwCQGINYvczPx3H2q6GYR7kak%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1190102701972708","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","no
